scripts.app:sync:prod: CAPACITOR_APP_VARIANT=prod npm run build:app && CAPACITOR_APP_VARIANT=prod cap sync
scripts.app:sync:dev: CAPACITOR_APP_VARIANT=dev npm run build:app && CAPACITOR_APP_VARIANT=dev cap sync
scripts.app:sync:local: CAPACITOR_APP_VARIANT=local npm run build:app && CAPACITOR_APP_VARIANT=local cap sync
scripts.app:android:prod: npm run app:sync:prod && cap open android
scripts.app:android:dev: npm run app:sync:dev && cap open android
scripts.app:android:local: npm run app:sync:local && cap open android
scripts.app:ios:prod: npm run app:sync:prod && cap open ios
scripts.app:ios:dev: npm run app:sync:dev && cap open ios
scripts.app:ios:local: npm run app:sync:local && cap open ios
scripts.app:ota:prod: CAPACITOR_APP_VARIANT=prod npm run build:app && CAPACITOR_APP_VARIANT=prod npx @capgo/cli bundle upload --channel production
scripts.app:ota:dev: CAPACITOR_APP_VARIANT=dev npm run build:app && CAPACITOR_APP_VARIANT=dev npx @capgo/cli bundle upload --channel dev
